verdict.summary: Guide has correct core pass prices, but several practical claims are materially wrong or outdated: youth/student discounts, card issuance/validity, digital wallet support, monthly validity, and tourist ticket prices.

issues.current: Дети до 12 — бесплатно (с 2024), дети 13–18 и студенты — 20 €.
issues.problem: As of 2026 this is misleading/outdated. In the current regime, students aged 4–18 and higher-education students up to 23 are generally eligible for free monthly passes, subject to proof/enrolment rules. The €20 figure is not the current general student price.
issues.suggestion: Write instead: "Дети/школьники и студенты: passe gratuito для учащихся 4–18 и студентов до 23 лет при подтверждении matrícula/eligibility; без этого применяются обычные тарифы/спецрежимы. Проверяйте правила на navegante.pt."
issues.source: Decreto-Lei n.º 21/2024; navegante.pt passe gratuito estudantes

issues.problem: Outdated/misleading for 2026: eligible students 4–18 and higher-education students up to 23 have free passes under the current national free-pass regime. €20 is not the general student price.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Estudantes 4–18 e ensino superior até 23 — gratuito при ежегодном/периодическом подтверждении matrícula; детали зависят от статуса и документов."

issues.problem: The date/cut-off is imprecise. In AML the free child pass existed before 2024; 2024 is mainly relevant to the broader national free student-pass expansion. Also the product is usually framed around children/students and requires a personalised card, not just "free by age" at the gate.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Дети до 12/13 лет и учащиеся — бесплатно через персонализированный navegante при оформлении соответствующего профиля; с 2024 расширены бесплатные passes для студентов."

issues.problem: This is broadly true for the AML-wide +65 tariff, but incomplete: some municipalities, especially Lisboa for eligible residents, have municipal programmes making the pass free for residents aged 65+. Without the caveat, readers in Lisbon may overpay or miss the municipal benefit.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Senior 65+ — обычно 20 €/мес по тарифу navegante +65; в Lisboa и некоторых municípios для резидентов могут быть бесплатные municipal programmes — проверяйте по своему município."
issues.source: navegante.pt; Câmara Municipal de Lisboa free public transport programme

issues.problem: The cost table repeats the outdated €20 student/youth amount. In 2026 eligible students should be listed as free, with documentation caveats.
issues.suggestion: Change amountEUR to 0 and note: "для eligible students 4–18 / ensino superior até 23 при подтверждении matrícula; иначе обычный тариф".

issues.problem: The standard personalised navegante card fee is not reliably €6 in 2026. The usual published prices are higher for normal/urgent issuance, and free/discounted issuance may apply only in specific profiles or campaigns.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Персонализированная карта: обычно около 7 € при обычном выпуске и около 12 € при срочном; точную цену смотрите в тарифе navegante/оператора."

issues.problem: Misleading. Personalised navegante cards are not generally issued instantly at every Metro/Carris location. Normal issuance can take several working days; urgent issuance is available only at selected points and costs more.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Обычный выпуск занимает несколько рабочих дней; срочный/на месте — только в отдельных пунктах и дороже."
issues.source: navegante.pt; Metropolitano de Lisboa customer support pages

issues.problem: Personalised navegante/Lisboa Viva cards have an expiry date printed/encoded on the card; they are not indefinite.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Карта действует до указанной на ней даты; затем её нужно заменить/обновить."

issues.current: С 2025 Navegante интегрирован. Navegante Wallet Pass в iPhone/Android — приложил к туринкету, проехал. Удобно, заменяет пластик.
issues.problem: This appears false/misleading. There is no general Apple Wallet/Google Pay Navegante monthly-pass product that replaces the personalised plastic card across Metro/Carris/CP/Fertagus/Transtejo/MTS. Contactless bank-card payment exists only in limited contexts/products and is not the same as a navegante monthly pass.
issues.suggestion: Remove this section or replace with: "Apple Pay/Google Pay с банковской картой может работать только там, где оператор поддерживает contactless ticketing, и обычно как разовая поездка, не как monthly navegante pass. Для passe mensal нужен personalised navegante/card/app-supported top-up."
issues.source: navegante.pt; Metropolitano de Lisboa contactless bank card information

issues.current: Скачать «Navegante» app (Android / iOS). Привязать существующую карту через NFC или создать digital wallet. Пополнение через MB Way, карта.
issues.problem: The top-up/consultation part is plausible, but "создать digital wallet" is misleading if it implies a fully virtual pass usable at validators instead of the physical personalised card. The official app functionality should be described narrowly unless verified for all operators.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Через app можно управлять/пополнять карту при поддержке NFC и доступных способов оплаты; не рассчитывайте, что телефон полностью заменит карту на всех видах транспорта."

issues.current: 💰 Месяц считается с числа активации (не календарный)
issues.problem: Wrong for standard Navegante monthly passes. The €30/€40 passes are monthly calendar products, not rolling 30-day passes from activation date.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Passe mensal действует на календарный месяц; обычно следующий месяц можно купить ближе к концу текущего месяца."

issues.current: 🔄 Продление за 5 дней до окончания — без перерыва
issues.problem: The timing is misleading. Monthly pass sales/renewals are tied to the monthly sales window, commonly from around the 26th for the following month, not a generic "5 days before expiry" rule.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Пополнение на следующий месяц обычно открывается в конце текущего месяца; проверяйте окно продаж у Navegante/оператора."

issues.problem: The 24-hour Carris/Metro ticket price is likely outdated for 2026; recent tariff tables list a higher value than €6.80. This should not be hard-coded without checking the current tariff table.
issues.suggestion: Write: "passe de 24h Carris/Metro — около 7 €; точную цену смотрите в тарифе navegante/Metro/Carris."

issues.current: Поездка ~1.80 € метро, 2 € автобус. Скидка 15 % от обычного тарифа.
issues.problem: Over-simplified and partly misleading. Zapping fares differ by operator/mode and are not a flat 15% discount. Carris/Metro zapping has its own tariff, CP/Fertagus/Transtejo have different fare rules.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Zapping — предоплаченный баланс; цена зависит от оператора и маршрута. Для Carris/Metro это дешевле разового билета, но не универсальная скидка 15%."

issues.problem: Misleading wording. Navegante Municipal is a pass valid for one selected municipality; it is not necessarily limited to the municipality where the buyer resides, except where a local benefit/free programme imposes residency conditions.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Действует в одном выбранном município; municipal free/discount programmes may require residence in that município."

issues.current: Sources include Navegante, Metro, Carris, CP, AMT only.
issues.problem: For claims about youth/student free passes and senior/free municipal programmes, the guide should cite the specific legal/official sources, not only general operator homepages.
issues.suggestion: Add sources: Decreto-Lei n.º 21/2024 for free student passes; Câmara Municipal de Lisboa page for free resident passes; Navegante tariff table/FAQ URL rather than only the homepage.
issues.source: Decreto-Lei n.º 21/2024; Câmara Municipal de Lisboa; navegante.pt tariff/FAQ pages

missing_topics: Clarify that standard monthly Navegante passes are calendar-month products, not rolling 30-day products.
Explain current free-pass rules for eligible students aged 4–18 and higher-education students up to 23, including matrícula/proof requirements.
Mention Lisbon municipal free-pass programmes for eligible residents, especially 65+ residents, separately from the general AML +65 tariff.
Clarify that Apple Pay/Google Pay/contactless bank cards are not the same as a Navegante monthly pass and are only accepted for specific operators/products.
Add practical details on personalised card issuance time, urgent issuance, expiry date, and where cards can actually be issued.
